steps.title: Express a and b in terms of c
steps.content:
From A is 6,000% of C:
$$a = \frac{6000}{100}c = 60c$$

From C is 0.008% of B:
$$c = 0.00008b$$
Solving for $b$:
$$b = \frac{c}{0.00008} = 12500c$$

steps.title: Sum a and b
steps.content:
$$a + b = 60c + 12500c = 12560c$$

That matches choice A — A is correct.
